sections.description: Storage abstraction and implementations for time series metrics. Provides a unified Store/Appender interface for both ingestion and querying, with multiple backend implementations (in-memory, filesystem with WAL, Prometheus remote-write, VictoriaMetrics). Includes a Prometheus storage.Queryable adapter for PromQL engine integration.
sections.purpose: Core storage layer that abstracts metric ingestion and retrieval from transport and query layers. Enables pluggable storage backends and zero-copy query optimization through the Prometheus storage interfaces. Handles durability via write-ahead logging (WAL), block-based persistence, and automatic compaction/retention.
sections.strengths: Clean interface-based design separating storage contract from implementations. Supports multiple backends without coupling. WAL provides crash recovery. Block-based architecture enables compaction and retention policies. Prometheus adapter provides direct PromQL compatibility. Efficient in-memory head block with hash-based fingerprints. All interfaces follow Go best practices (consumer-defined).
sections.weaknesses: JSON-based block serialization may not be optimal for large datasets. Limited metadata/index support compared to Prometheus TSDB. No chunk compression on disk. VictoriaMetrics and Prometheus Remote implementations have limited query support (read-only in VictoriaMetrics). Compaction is simple merge with no intelligent bucketing. No streaming decompression for large exports.
sections.test_coverage: Unit tests cover FSStore (fsstore_test.go), MemStore (memstore_test.go), WAL replay/encoding (wal_test.go), Prometheus adapter (adapter_test.go), Prometheus remote-write (prometheus_remote_test.go), and VictoriaMetrics integration (victoriametrics_test.go). Moq mocks auto-generated for Store and Appender interfaces. Tests cover basic read/write paths and WAL recovery; edge cases in compaction and retention less comprehensive.
sections.dependencies: github.com/prometheus/prometheus (model/labels, storage, tsdb/chunkenc, util/annotations, prompb). github.com/golang/snappy (compression). Built on Prometheus model types and remote-write protocol. No internal dependencies within the project aside from interfaces.go.
sections.functionality: Store interface: Appender (batched writes), Select (time-range queries with matchers), LabelNames/LabelValues (cardinality queries), Close. MemStore: in-memory head block with fingerprint-based hash table and sample pruning. FSStore: combines MemStore with WAL (segment-based rotation) + immutable block files + compaction loop + retention (time/size-based). Block format: meta.json (min/max time, sample count) + data.json (series+samples). WAL format: binary-encoded records with label pairs, timestamp, value. PrometheusRemote: forwards writes to Prometheus remote-write endpoint with batch/retry logic. VMRemote: read/write to VictoriaMetrics /api/v1/import endpoint with JSON format. Adapter: bridges internal SeriesSet to Prometheus storage.SeriesSet/Series types.
sections.files: interfaces.go (Store/Appender/SeriesSet/Series/Sample), adapter.go (Prometheus storage.Queryable bridge), block.go (immutable block I/O and compaction), fsstore.go (filesystem store + WAL + head flush + compaction loop), memstore.go (in-memory store), wal.go (write-ahead log), prometheus_remote.go (Prometheus remote-write backend), victoriametrics.go (VictoriaMetrics backend), moq_test.go (generated mocks), *_test.go (unit tests)
